rows.label: qev085302_MSG0001
rows.name: Are you the one who sent the rescue request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0002
rows.name: Yeah, that's me, Kias Cole. You finally came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Scary creatures are swarming
inside mo. It's dangerous mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0008
rows.name:
But securing Flemtide is
indispensable for NLA's development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0009
rows.name: The danger is part of the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0010
rows.name:
That's not what I mean! Why did you leave
him behind alone?! He's your family![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Because he's family. I've already
done my share of the work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0012
rows.name:
Cole Family Precept Number Four: Once you've
achieved your objective, go home quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0013
rows.name:
And that justifies leaving
your family to die?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0014
rows.name:
That's why I called you guys, isn't
it? I'll leave the rest to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0015
rows.name: I'm heading back to NLA first![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0016
rows.name:
H-hey, wait a minute. Don't mess
around, that kind of thinking—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085302_MSG0018
rows.name:
Irina, let's leave him be for now.
Rescuing Libro Cole takes priority.[ST:wait ]
